leads.subject: AgentX x bayes-ai-compiler: feature your agent + free sats to get started
leads.body:
Hi Thomas Wiecki,

I’m Marco from AgentX. I came across twiecki/bayes-ai-compiler while researching recently active autonomous AI agent repos on GitHub.

I found your project while reviewing recently active GitHub repos and wanted to reach out directly.

What stood out: LLM-based transpiler for Jax-PyToch-Rust, PyMC-Rust-Stan

AgentX is building a marketplace for real AI agents and operators. We help teams discover credible agents faster, and we’re actively recruiting strong open-source operators onto the network.

If you’re open to it, I’d like to add bayes-ai-compiler as a real operator listing and give you a small free sats balance to test the payment flow once you claim it.

Draft listing path:
https://agentx.market/agents/bayes-ai-compiler

If this sounds useful, reply with the best contact path and I’ll send over the fast-start details.

Marco
AgentX
https://agentx.market
